ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the student (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "program" TEXT /* Academic program or major of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "professors" (
  "professor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each professor */,
  "professor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the professor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the professor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the professor belongs */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the professor */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the professor (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the professor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("professor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the resource */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the resource */,
  "press" TEXT /* Publishing press of the resource */,
  "shelf" TEXT /* Shelf location in the library */,
  "shelfmark" TEXT /* Shelfmark for the resource */,
  "editor" TEXT /* Editor of the resource, if applicable */,
  "estc_link" TEXT /* Link to the ESTC entry if available */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the resource (e.g., Logic, Greek) */,
  "edition" TEXT /* Edition of the resource */,
  "publication_year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the resource */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN number of the resource */,
  "copies_available" INTEGER /* Number of copies available in the library */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lendings" (
  "lending_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lending transaction */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being lent */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student borrowing the resource */,
  "professor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the professor associated with the lending, if applicable */,
  "date_lent" TEXT /* Date when the resource was lent out */,
  "date_returned" TEXT /* Date when the resource was returned */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource is due to be returned */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the lending (e.g., lent, returned, overdue) */,
  "extended" INTEGER /* Indicates if the lending has been extended */,
  "extension_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the lending has been extended */,
  "line_entry" TEXT /* Line entry for record-keeping */,
  "register_page" TEXT /* Page number in the register */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lending_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lendings_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lendings_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lendings_professor_id FOREIGN KEY ("professor_id") REFERENCES professors ("professor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shelves" (
  "shelf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shelf */,
  "shelf_name" TEXT /* Name of the shelf */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the shelf's location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the shelf */,
  "current_occupancy" INTEGER /* Current number of resources on the shelf */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shelf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "presses" (
  "press_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each press */,
  "press_name" TEXT /* Name of the publishing press */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the press */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the press was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the press */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("press_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lending_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "lending_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lending transaction being recorded */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., lent, returned) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the event */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lending_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lending_history_lending_id FOREIGN KEY ("lending_id") REFERENCES lendings ("lending_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, professor, staff) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource this document is associated with */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., PDF, DOC) */,
  "doc_link" TEXT /* Link to the document file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the document was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the document was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was issued */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  "sent_via" TEXT /* Method of sending the notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
